closed_form_equation_v93.feature_term: K_f_v93 = K_f_v92 + K_f_v92 * S_sys_band_score * 0.004 + K_f_v92 * B_plastic_v37 * 0.001 + K_f_v92 * D_feature_v31 * 0.001

closed_form_equation_v93.learning_term: K_l_v93 = K_l_v92 + K_l_v92 * R_train_v37 + M_sys_band * 1000 + S_sys_band_score * 1000 + M_brain_direct_v31 * 1000

project_readout.summary: v93 checks whether systemic low-risk band extension starts turning into a broader and more stable low-risk field instead of only extending the previous band.
project_readout.next_question: next push this broader low-risk field into larger and longer systems to test whether it keeps extending toward a wider low-risk steady field.
